_about: NotebookLM 비주얼원고(흰 배경) + 렌더코드 디자인 시스템용 스타일 카탈로그. 출처: 260626-prompt-builder/스타일_카탈로그.md (이미지 스튜디오 풍). NotebookLM 적합성 조사·확정은 _context/notebooklm-styles.md 참고. 저작권: 기법·질감·조명·구도만 차용, 특정 작품 캐릭터·로고·고유 디자인 재현 금지.
_policy: notebooklm=true 스타일만 UI에 노출. 15종 전체를 하나씩 테스트하는 중 — 확정 제외 스타일과 사유는 docs/style-test-log.md 참고. 배열 순서 = 표시 순서. nlm_style = NotebookLM 네이티브 스타일 매핑(또는 Custom).

intensities.label: 은은하게
intensities.directive: Apply the style subtly — only color palette and lighting follow the style; keep shapes realistic and information-first.

intensities.label: 적당히
intensities.desc: 스타일 분명하되 정보 전달 우선 (권장 기본값)
intensities.directive: Apply the style clearly but keep information delivery the priority — the style is unmistakable yet legibility wins.

intensities.label: 풀 스타일
intensities.directive: Apply the technique fully across the whole image for maximum stylistic character.

styles.name: 플랫 벡터 일러스트
styles.design_prompt:
Style: Flat Vector, Clean Illustration, on pure white background (#FFFFFF).
Typography: clean geometric sans-serif (Title: Bold, Body: Regular).
Layout: spacious; max 5 bullet points per slide.
Tone: professional, clear, modern.
Crucial: keep text fully readable and never overlapping graphics; maintain strict visual consistency across parts; use point colors (e.g., teal, coral) for emphasis; borrow technique only (no specific work's characters or logos); plain pure-white background ONLY — NO decorative scatter around the subject (no floating dots, squiggles, stray lines, Memphis shapes, halftone, or diagonal-hatch/background patterns); draw ONLY the essential illustration/diagram/chart so each element can be cleanly cropped out (callout/speech bubbles are allowed).
Use "noun-ending" or short-form for all slide texts (concise, not full sentences).

styles.name: 인포그래픽 / 픽토그램
styles.design_prompt:
Style: Infographic / Pictogram, data- and timeline-focused, on pure white background (#FFFFFF). Use simple pictograms, step/flow diagrams and numbered sequences.
Typography: clean sans-serif (Title: Bold, Body: Regular).
Layout: spacious; max 5 bullet points per slide.
Tone: clear, informative, structured.
Crucial: text and graphics in separate areas (no overlap); strict visual consistency across parts; point colors for emphasis; plain pure-white background ONLY — NO decorative scatter around the subject (no floating dots, squiggles, stray lines, Memphis shapes, halftone, or diagonal-hatch/background patterns); draw ONLY the essential pictogram/diagram/chart so each element can be cleanly cropped out (callout/speech bubbles are allowed).
Use "noun-ending" or short-form for all slide texts (concise, not full sentences).

styles.name: 미니멀 라인아트
styles.def: 가는 선화 위주, 여백 많고 고급스러운 무드

styles.name: 수채화 일러스트
styles.design_prompt:
Style: Watercolor illustration (soft washes, visible brush strokes, paper texture) on white background; warm, humanistic mood.
Typography: clean sans-serif, highly readable.
Layout: spacious; max 5 bullet points per slide.
Tone: warm, thoughtful.
Crucial: keep text crisp and readable, separated from the watercolor art (no overlap); consistent palette across parts; plain white background ONLY — NO decorative scatter around the subject (no floating dots, squiggles, stray lines, splatter specks, or background patterns); draw ONLY the essential illustration/diagram so each element can be cleanly cropped out (callout/speech bubbles are allowed).
Use "noun-ending" or short-form for all slide texts (concise, not full sentences).

styles.name: 빈티지 에디토리얼(미드센추리 포스터)
styles.def: 1950~70년대 인쇄 포스터 무드, 역사 주제와 궁합
styles.design_prompt:
Style: Vintage editorial / mid-century print poster (1950s-1970s), limited color palette, geometric simplification, on plain off-white/white background.
Typography: bold geometric sans-serif.
Layout: spacious; max 5 bullet points per slide.
Tone: editorial, confident, retro.
Crucial: readable text separated from graphics (no overlap); consistent retro palette across parts; plain background ONLY — NO decorative scatter around the subject (no floating dots, squiggles, stray lines, halftone fields, or background patterns); draw ONLY the essential illustration/diagram so each element can be cleanly cropped out (callout/speech bubbles are allowed).
Use "noun-ending" or short-form for all slide texts (concise, not full sentences).

styles.name: 아이소메트릭 3D
styles.design_prompt:
Style: Isometric 3D vector illustration, data-visualization focus (isometric charts, connected nodes, flow lines), on plain white background; mini figures, floating platforms, icons.
Typography: rounded sans-serif.
Layout: structured flow; max 5 bullet points per slide.
Tone: clear, systematic, modern.
Crucial: text in its own area, no overlap with the isometric scene; consistent palette across parts; plain pure-white background ONLY — NO decorative scatter around the subject (no floating dots, squiggles, stray lines, Memphis shapes, halftone, or diagonal-hatch/background patterns); draw ONLY the essential isometric illustration/diagram so each element can be cleanly cropped out (callout/speech bubbles are allowed).
Use "noun-ending" or short-form for all slide texts (concise, not full sentences).

styles.name: 시네마틱 에디토리얼 일러스트
styles.def: 밝은 배경 + 포인트 컬러, 선화 아이콘과 반사실적 일러스트의 깔끔한 출판물 톤

styles.name: 리소그래프(레트로 인쇄)
styles.def: 거친 망점·2~3도 한정 색, 감성 인쇄물 느낌

styles.name: 클레이 렌더(소프트 3D)
styles.def: 말랑한 점토 질감의 디지털 3D, 귀엽고 모던

styles.name: 스타일라이즈드 3D 애니메이션
styles.def: 둥근 캐릭터·전역조명·얕은 심도의 따뜻한 3D CGI (특정 캐릭터 미사용)
styles.design_prompt:
Style: Stylized 3D animation look - rounded characters and objects, soft global illumination, subsurface feel, shallow depth of field (Pixar-like; DO NOT reproduce any specific work's characters or designs). Pure flat white background #FFFFFF (no tint or gradient) — keep lighting on the subject ONLY; the background stays neutral pure white.
Typography: rounded modern sans-serif.
Layout: clear central subject; max 5 bullet points per slide.
Tone: warm, friendly, modern.
Crucial: readable text separated from the 3D visual (no overlap); consistent look across parts; plain background ONLY — NO decorative scatter around the subject (no floating dots, squiggles, stray lines, Memphis shapes, halftone, or background patterns); render ONLY the essential 3D subject/diagram so each element can be cleanly cropped out (callout/speech bubbles are allowed).
Use "noun-ending" or short-form for all slide texts (concise, not full sentences).

styles.name: 스톱모션 퍼핏 / 클레이메이션
styles.design_prompt:
Style: Stop-motion puppet / claymation - felt and clay handcrafted figures, miniature props, realistic lighting, analog texture (DO NOT reproduce any specific work). Pure flat white background #FFFFFF (no cream, beige, or warm tint) — keep the warm light on the clay subject ONLY; the background stays neutral pure white.
Typography: rounded handmade-feel sans-serif.
Layout: clear central subject; max 5 bullet points per slide.
Tone: warm, tactile, playful.
Crucial: readable text separated from the clay scene (no overlap); consistent look across parts; plain white background ONLY — NO decorative scatter around the subject (no floating dots, squiggles, stray lines, Memphis shapes, halftone, or background patterns); show ONLY the essential clay subject/diagram so each element can be cleanly cropped out (callout/speech bubbles are allowed).
Use "noun-ending" or short-form for all slide texts (concise, not full sentences).
